charlatan 0.6.0
    • Get started
    • Reference
    • Articles
      Contributing to charlatan Creating realistic data
    • Changelog

    Create fake DOIs (Digital Object Identifiers)

    Source: R/doi.R
    ch_doi.Rd

    Create fake DOIs (Digital Object Identifiers)

    Usage

    ch_doi(n = 1)

    Arguments

    n

    (integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

    See also

    DOIProvider

    Examples

    ch_doi()
#> [1] "10.37479/53056-94101-6094"
ch_doi(10)
#>  [1] "10.15797/88691.42778.1140" "10.69844/mncl.69364222"   
#>  [3] "10.2514/qkzy.3470788"      "10.15050/mgfz.98994363"   
#>  [5] "10.24858/9888.29692.4871"  "10.95783/cjsi.21005398"   
#>  [7] "10.69882/hzyt.16242890"    "10.18322/83836.34280.9858"
#>  [9] "10.83079/24709-41082-8283" "10.66208/9730-81764-2423" 
ch_doi(100)
#>   [1] "10.21398/75257.26532.6833" "10.83778/21254-82018-3194"
#>   [3] "10.41048/92444-75696-4027" "10.75285/30439-17945-7821"
#>   [5] "10.66694/49419.23197.1615" "10.66177/56019-81397-3081"
#>   [7] "10.44138/eaqg.8681691"     "10.31619/lhjt.70684365"   
#>   [9] "10.1316/ajsx.87649927"     "10.74582/cziy.44994664"   
#>  [11] "10.8397/kzjc.20545677"     "10.28883/7082-39131-8254" 
#>  [13] "10.49040/73184-11404-2110" "10.27308/43842.33068.4098"
#>  [15] "10.18489/47572.5951.6899"  "10.35204/42185-97114-823" 
#>  [17] "10.75180/fnhj.52398121"    "10.31526/zoha.65037191"   
#>  [19] "10.81411/kbef.21340139"    "10.12009/dbgy.40735961"   
#>  [21] "10.37240/52957-69569-7489" "10.69119/zrlf.12351792"   
#>  [23] "10.44771/26955-73570-6277" "10.45911/56771-8338-3238" 
#>  [25] "10.62431/cane.70650234"    "10.60874/11766.50288.7564"
#>  [27] "10.62353/59036-19953-9680" "10.92939/90906.7101.1790" 
#>  [29] "10.36689/gilx.59568317"    "10.68270/aymh.26545734"   
#>  [31] "10.22021/72254-473-2154"   "10.31090/fvsz.48291606"   
#>  [33] "10.69556/xgit.1514033"     "10.97955/57155-22484-9239"
#>  [35] "10.61483/44810-6474-6093"  "10.95515/59304.97972.1789"
#>  [37] "10.30578/14937.14675.1002" "10.26601/69389-67239-2635"
#>  [39] "10.76862/evut.94143853"    "10.16713/ubti.45352185"   
#>  [41] "10.53591/xpfd.91312503"    "10.42739/hbwt.81469859"   
#>  [43] "10.49969/vwah.46556207"    "10.14946/27515-77056-8023"
#>  [45] "10.80392/yatv.54053741"    "10.11992/fvqi.73629144"   
#>  [47] "10.44365/68946-23920-312"  "10.33443/rcyg.74431083"   
#>  [49] "10.65728/uzfo.1682303"     "10.41370/mvdf.55342696"   
#>  [51] "10.88711/97851-49114-8704" "10.37318/qmec.11951604"   
#>  [53] "10.59031/qlum.60946860"    "10.16447/3760-17135-7050" 
#>  [55] "10.34524/pilm.99862666"    "10.40210/krqv.31303085"   
#>  [57] "10.3746/97844-69974-2124"  "10.79015/59864-24779-2661"
#>  [59] "10.82732/71384-18530-2002" "10.53724/toib.38604724"   
#>  [61] "10.875/rmcl.64572847"      "10.44419/2140.81887.8410" 
#>  [63] "10.95018/73713.42914.6221" "10.42655/ehfr.42471810"   
#>  [65] "10.37287/64506-15348-1604" "10.37346/30212.62563.4843"
#>  [67] "10.66877/37208-97958-1083" "10.76572/cxmv.68512482"   
#>  [69] "10.1112/ylhb.47586997"     "10.56660/opdl.5407453"    
#>  [71] "10.60690/16990-43662-5673" "10.65412/krba.90132262"   
#>  [73] "10.20232/zrti.17795528"    "10.46081/fpol.3944547"    
#>  [75] "10.72306/51468.78617.4153" "10.47347/rhld.87862410"   
#>  [77] "10.30539/14778.63959.7509" "10.71904/rkax.21661846"   
#>  [79] "10.73302/14435-96480-8276" "10.67947/czmq.88890807"   
#>  [81] "10.89084/icwe.79289524"    "10.36314/pakv.10224684"   
#>  [83] "10.65580/28712.79674.9612" "10.76141/73877-66985-5606"
#>  [85] "10.45110/kwlq.99880756"    "10.59852/qorc.12475138"   
#>  [87] "10.47004/44801-36007-2877" "10.84074/lwbt.43521419"   
#>  [89] "10.30603/xhci.2315419"     "10.54324/dzrq.69429849"   
#>  [91] "10.14120/77605-63295-6182" "10.14458/flcm.2362132"    
#>  [93] "10.85232/32547.71692.6164" "10.24281/69593.14793.1433"
#>  [95] "10.74999/zysg.17600577"    "10.83964/28981-12314-3281"
#>  [97] "10.45775/yjum.11229086"    "10.25184/cpgt.1312551"    
#>  [99] "10.96741/eqyj.31319127"    "10.26319/peyc.20911464"
